fa-people-pulling.appearanceId: two human silhouettes facing each other with arms extended and leaning backward in a tug-of-war pose, a horizontal line or rope between them; pair of figures straining away from a central point
fa-people-pulling.functionalityId: represents a tug-of-war, competitive pulling action, or opposing forces between two parties; illustrates tension or conflict between two groups
fa-people-pulling.intentId: depict a competition, conflict, or opposing forces between two parties; represent teamwork under tension or a dispute scenario

fa-people-robbery.appearanceId: two human silhouettes with one figure holding an outstretched arm toward the other in a threatening gesture, suggesting a holdup or mugging; aggressor and victim stick-figure pair
fa-people-robbery.functionalityId: represents a robbery, mugging, or criminal threat scenario; indicates a safety alert or crime-related event involving two people
fa-people-robbery.intentId: report or warn about a robbery or mugging incident; indicate a personal safety threat or criminal activity scenario

fa-people-roof.appearanceId: two human silhouettes standing beneath a triangular roof or peaked shelter outline, centered between the two figures; pair of stick figures under a house gable shape
fa-people-roof.functionalityId: represents people under shelter or housed individuals; indicates a housing, refugee, or community shelter context
fa-people-roof.intentId: indicate access to shelter or housing for displaced or vulnerable people; represent a community housing or refugee support program

fa-people-simple.appearanceId: two simplified human stick-figure silhouettes standing side by side with circular heads and straight bodies; minimal paired person outlines with no detailed features
fa-people-simple.functionalityId: represents a group of people, a pair, or a population count; indicates a multi-person or community context in a simplified style
fa-people-simple.intentId: represent a group, pair, or general population in a simple visual; indicate multi-user or community-level context

fa-pepper.appearanceId: a smooth bell pepper silhouette with a rounded lobed body and a short stem at the top; sweet pepper outline with a curved multi-lobed shape
fa-pepper.functionalityId: represents a bell pepper vegetable in food or recipe contexts; labels a pepper ingredient in a cooking or grocery interface
fa-pepper.intentId: identify or select a bell pepper in a recipe or grocery list; indicate a vegetable ingredient in a food or nutrition interface

fa-pepper-hot.appearanceId: a curved chili pepper silhouette with a pointed tip, tapered body, and a short stem at the top; hot chili pepper outline with a slender arching shape
fa-pepper-hot.functionalityId: represents a hot or spicy chili pepper in food or recipe contexts; indicates a spiciness level or hot ingredient in a menu or cooking interface
fa-pepper-hot.intentId: indicate spicy or hot food content in a recipe or menu; label a hot chili pepper ingredient in a cooking or dining application

fa-percent.appearanceId: a percent sign glyph with two small circles positioned at the upper-left and lower-right connected by a diagonal slash stroke; standard percentage typographic symbol
fa-percent.functionalityId: represents a percentage value, ratio, or proportion; inserts or displays a percent sign in a numeric or financial field
fa-percent.intentId: display or enter a percentage value in a numeric or financial interface; indicate a ratio or proportional measurement

fa-period.appearanceId: a single small filled circle or dot centered at the baseline of the icon space; typographic period or full-stop punctuation mark
fa-period.functionalityId: represents a period, full stop, or decimal point punctuation mark; inserts a terminal punctuation character in a text field
fa-period.intentId: insert a period or full-stop character in a text editing interface; indicate end of a sentence or a decimal separator

fa-person-arrow-down-to-line.appearanceId: a human stick-figure silhouette with a downward-pointing arrow above or beside it and a horizontal baseline or floor line below the arrow tip; person figure with a descending arrow to a ground line
fa-person-arrow-down-to-line.functionalityId: represents a person arriving, landing, or being directed downward to a baseline; indicates check-in, arrival, or descent to a floor level
fa-person-arrow-down-to-line.intentId: indicate a person arriving at or descending to a specific level or location; represent a check-in, landing, or placement action

fa-person-arrow-up-from-line.appearanceId: a human stick-figure silhouette with an upward-pointing arrow above it and a horizontal baseline or floor line below the figure; person figure rising upward from a ground line
fa-person-arrow-up-from-line.functionalityId: represents a person departing, rising, or being directed upward from a baseline; indicates evacuation, departure, or ascending from a floor
fa-person-arrow-up-from-line.intentId: indicate a person departing from or rising above a specific level; represent evacuation, check-out, or an upward movement action

fa-person-booth.appearanceId: a human stick-figure silhouette standing inside or beside a rectangular vertical booth or curtained enclosure outline; person figure within a narrow vertical chamber shape
fa-person-booth.functionalityId: represents a person in a voting booth, phone booth, or private enclosure; indicates voting, privacy, or a single-occupancy space
fa-person-booth.intentId: indicate a voting booth or private enclosure for a single person; represent civic participation or a privacy screen context

fa-person-breastfeeding.appearanceId: a seated human silhouette cradling a small infant figure at the chest in a nursing pose; mother-and-baby silhouette in a breastfeeding position
fa-person-breastfeeding.functionalityId: represents breastfeeding or infant nursing; indicates a nursing room, lactation area, or maternal feeding context
fa-person-breastfeeding.intentId: locate a nursing or lactation room; indicate breastfeeding support resources or a maternal care context

fa-person-burst.appearanceId: a human stick-figure silhouette surrounded by short radiating burst lines or spikes emanating outward from the body in multiple directions; person figure with explosion or energy burst lines
fa-person-burst.functionalityId: represents a person in distress, an explosion near a person, or a dramatic impact event; indicates an emergency, crisis, or sudden energetic action involving a person
fa-person-burst.intentId: indicate a person in an emergency or explosion scenario; represent a crisis event or sudden impact affecting an individual

fa-person-cane.appearanceId: a human stick-figure silhouette in an upright standing pose holding a diagonal cane or walking stick at one side; elderly or mobility-assisted person figure with a cane prop
fa-person-cane.functionalityId: represents an elderly person, mobility aid user, or individual with a walking cane; indicates accessibility, senior care, or disability accommodation
fa-person-cane.intentId: indicate accessibility needs or elderly care services; represent a mobility-assisted individual in a healthcare or accessibility context

fa-person-carry.appearanceId: a human stick-figure silhouette in a forward-leaning pose with both arms extended downward holding or supporting a box or rectangular load; person figure carrying a package or cargo
fa-person-carry.functionalityId: represents a person carrying a package, box, or heavy item; indicates moving, delivery, or manual handling of cargo
fa-person-carry.intentId: indicate package carrying, delivery, or manual freight handling; represent a moving or logistics action involving a person

fa-person-chalkboard.appearanceId: a human stick-figure silhouette standing beside or in front of a large rectangular chalkboard or whiteboard panel, with one arm raised toward the board; presenter figure next to a board surface
fa-person-chalkboard.functionalityId: represents a teacher, presenter, or instructor at a chalkboard; indicates a lecture, training session, or educational presentation context
fa-person-chalkboard.intentId: indicate a teaching, training, or presentation activity; represent an instructor or educator at a board in an educational interface

fa-person-circle-check.appearanceId: a human stick-figure silhouette with a small filled circle containing a checkmark overlaid in the lower-right or upper-right corner; person figure with a check badge overlay
fa-person-circle-check.functionalityId: represents a verified, approved, or confirmed person; indicates that a user profile or individual has passed a check or been approved
fa-person-circle-check.intentId: confirm or approve a person's status or identity; indicate a verified or cleared individual in a user management interface

fa-person-circle-exclamation.appearanceId: a human stick-figure silhouette with a small filled circle containing an exclamation mark overlaid in the lower-right or upper-right corner; person figure with an alert badge overlay
fa-person-circle-exclamation.functionalityId: represents a person with a warning or alert status; indicates that a user profile requires attention or has an outstanding issue
fa-person-circle-exclamation.intentId: flag a person with a warning or alert; indicate that a user has an outstanding issue requiring attention

fa-person-circle-minus.appearanceId: a human stick-figure silhouette with a small filled circle containing a horizontal minus bar overlaid in the lower-right or upper-right corner; person figure with a remove or subtract badge overlay
fa-person-circle-minus.functionalityId: removes or demotes a person from a group or list; indicates that a user is being deducted or downgraded
fa-person-circle-minus.intentId: remove or deduct a person from a group, team, or permission list; indicate a user removal or demotion action

fa-person-circle-plus.appearanceId: a human stick-figure silhouette with a small filled circle containing a plus sign overlaid in the lower-right or upper-right corner; person figure with an add or new-member badge overlay
fa-person-circle-plus.functionalityId: adds or enrolls a new person to a group or list; indicates that a user is being added or promoted
fa-person-circle-plus.intentId: add a new person or member to a group, team, or permission list; indicate a user enrollment or addition action

fa-person-circle-question.appearanceId: a human stick-figure silhouette with a small filled circle containing a question mark overlaid in the lower-right or upper-right corner; person figure with an unknown or inquiry badge overlay
fa-person-circle-question.functionalityId: represents an unknown, unidentified, or questionable person; indicates that a user's status or identity is uncertain or under review
fa-person-circle-question.intentId: flag an unidentified or uncertain user; indicate that a person's status or identity needs clarification

fa-person-circle-xmark.appearanceId: a human stick-figure silhouette with a small filled circle containing an X mark overlaid in the lower-right or upper-right corner; person figure with a rejected or blocked badge overlay
fa-person-circle-xmark.functionalityId: rejects, blocks, or disqualifies a person from a group or access list; indicates that a user has been denied or removed
fa-person-circle-xmark.intentId: block, reject, or disqualify a user from a group or access list; indicate that a person has been denied access or removed from a system

fa-person-dolly.appearanceId: a human stick-figure silhouette standing beside or holding a hand truck or dolly frame with a stacked load or boxes on the base; person figure with a dolly cart and cargo
fa-person-dolly.functionalityId: represents a worker using a hand truck or dolly to move cargo; indicates loading, unloading, or material handling with a dolly
fa-person-dolly.intentId: indicate moving, loading, or transporting heavy cargo with a dolly; represent a warehouse or logistics worker handling freight

fa-person-dolly-empty.appearanceId: a human stick-figure silhouette standing beside or holding an empty hand truck or dolly frame with no load on the base; person figure with an unloaded dolly cart
fa-person-dolly-empty.functionalityId: represents a worker with an empty dolly ready to load cargo; indicates an available or unloaded material-handling cart
fa-person-dolly-empty.intentId: indicate an available or empty dolly ready for loading; represent a worker prepared to transport goods with an unloaded cart

fa-person-dress-burst.appearanceId: a skirted human silhouette in a dress shape surrounded by short radiating burst lines or spikes emanating outward from the body; dress-wearing figure with explosion or energy burst lines
fa-person-dress-burst.functionalityId: represents a person in a dress involved in an explosion, emergency, or dramatic impact; indicates a crisis or sudden energetic event affecting a dress-wearing figure
fa-person-dress-burst.intentId: indicate an emergency or explosion scenario involving a dress-wearing person; represent a crisis event affecting a female-presenting individual

fa-person-dress-fairy.appearanceId: a skirted human silhouette in a dress shape with small butterfly or insect wings extending from the upper back; fairy figure with a dress and delicate wing shapes
fa-person-dress-fairy.functionalityId: represents a fairy character in a fantastical or whimsical context; indicates a magical, fantasy, or costume-based theme
fa-person-dress-fairy.intentId: represent a fairy character or magical theme in a fantasy application; indicate a costume, fairy tale, or whimsical design element

fa-person-dress-simple.appearanceId: a simplified skirted human silhouette with a dress or skirt shape and circular head, rendered in minimal detail; basic dress-wearing figure outline with no decorative elements
fa-person-dress-simple.functionalityId: represents a female-presenting person or dress-wearing individual in a generic context; indicates a restroom, gender marker, or basic person category

fa-person-drowning.appearanceId: a human stick-figure silhouette with arms raised upward and the lower body submerged below wavy horizontal water lines; person figure partially underwater with raised arms
fa-person-drowning.functionalityId: represents a drowning or water distress emergency; indicates a water safety hazard or aquatic rescue situation
fa-person-drowning.intentId: indicate a water drowning emergency or aquatic safety hazard; represent a water rescue or distress scenario

fa-person-fairy.appearanceId: a human stick-figure silhouette with small butterfly or insect wings extending from the upper back; fairy figure without a dress with delicate wing shapes attached to the torso
fa-person-fairy.functionalityId: represents a fairy character in a fantastical or whimsical context; indicates a magical, fantasy, or costume-based theme involving a non-dress figure
fa-person-fairy.intentId: represent a fairy character or magical theme in a fantasy application; indicate a costume or whimsical design element for a non-skirted figure

fa-person-falling.appearanceId: a human stick-figure silhouette in a diagonal falling pose with limbs splayed and body tilted at an angle; person figure in a mid-fall or slip position
fa-person-falling.functionalityId: represents a person falling or slipping; indicates a slip-and-fall hazard, accident risk, or fall detection event
fa-person-falling.intentId: indicate a slip-and-fall hazard or accident warning; represent a fall detection alert or personal safety incident

fa-person-falling-burst.appearanceId: a human stick-figure silhouette in a diagonal falling pose surrounded by short radiating burst lines; falling person figure with explosion or impact burst lines
fa-person-falling-burst.functionalityId: represents a person falling with an explosive or dramatic impact; indicates a severe fall, explosion-caused fall, or high-impact accident
fa-person-falling-burst.intentId: indicate a severe or explosion-related fall incident; represent a high-impact accident or emergency fall scenario

fa-person-half-dress.appearanceId: a human silhouette where the left half of the body is depicted in pants or trousers and the right half wears a skirt or dress; vertically split figure with contrasting gender-presentation halves

fa-person-harassing.appearanceId: two human stick-figure silhouettes with one figure in an aggressive leaning posture toward the other who appears to be recoiling or shielding; aggressor-and-target pair with confrontational body language
fa-person-harassing.functionalityId: represents workplace harassment, bullying, or interpersonal aggression between two figures; indicates a harassment incident or reporting scenario
fa-person-harassing.intentId: report or indicate a harassment or bullying incident; represent workplace aggression or interpersonal conflict in a safety or HR context

fa-person-military-pointing.appearanceId: a uniformed military figure silhouette with one arm fully extended forward in a pointing gesture; soldier or service member figure with an outstretched directing arm
fa-person-military-pointing.functionalityId: represents a military officer directing, commanding, or giving orders; indicates a command, navigation, or tactical direction action
fa-person-military-pointing.intentId: indicate a military command, direction, or tactical instruction; represent a service member directing personnel or resources

fa-person-military-rifle.appearanceId: a uniformed military figure silhouette in an upright stance holding a long rifle weapon at the side or across the body; soldier figure with a rifle prop
fa-person-military-rifle.functionalityId: represents an armed military or security personnel figure; indicates a military, armed forces, or weapon-carrying role
fa-person-military-rifle.intentId: represent armed military or security personnel in an interface; indicate a military role or armed forces context

fa-person-military-to-person.appearanceId: a uniformed military figure silhouette on one side handing off or transitioning toward a civilian stick-figure silhouette on the other side, with an arrow or directional cue between them; soldier-to-civilian handoff pair
fa-person-military-to-person.functionalityId: represents a military-to-civilian transition, handoff, or transfer of responsibility; indicates a demobilization, outreach, or service transition scenario
fa-person-military-to-person.intentId: indicate a military-to-civilian transition or service handoff; represent outreach, demobilization, or transfer of personnel between roles

fa-person-pinball.appearanceId: a human stick-figure silhouette in a dynamic airborne or bouncing pose reminiscent of a pinball being launched, with limbs spread; person figure in a pinball-like launched or bouncing position
fa-person-pinball.functionalityId: represents a pinball game character, a bouncing or launched person, or a playful energetic motion; indicates a game, fun activity, or arcade context
fa-person-pinball.intentId: represent a pinball game or playful arcade activity; indicate a fun or energetic bounce or launch action in a game interface

fa-person-pregnant.appearanceId: a human stick-figure silhouette with a prominently rounded abdomen indicating pregnancy; pregnant person figure with an extended belly profile
fa-person-pregnant.functionalityId: represents a pregnant person or maternity-related context; indicates prenatal care, maternity services, or pregnancy status
fa-person-pregnant.intentId: indicate pregnancy, maternity care, or prenatal services; represent a pregnant individual in a healthcare or family planning context

fa-person-rays.functionalityId: represents a person emitting energy, radiation, influence, or prominence; indicates wellness, radiance, a holy or iconic figure, or radiation exposure
fa-person-rays.intentId: indicate a person emitting energy, radiance, or influence; represent a wellness aura, saintly figure, or radiation exposure context

fa-person-rifle.appearanceId: a civilian human stick-figure silhouette holding a long rifle weapon at the side or in a shooting stance; non-uniformed person figure with a rifle prop

fa-person-rifle.intentId: represent a hunter, shooter, or civilian firearm user; indicate a hunting, gun ownership, or shooting sport context

fa-person-running-fast.appearanceId: a human stick-figure silhouette in an exaggerated sprinting or fast-running pose with forward-leaning body and extended limbs showing speed motion; person figure in a high-speed running stride
fa-person-running-fast.functionalityId: represents rapid movement, sprinting, or an urgent fast-paced action; indicates speed, urgency, or athletic sprinting
fa-person-running-fast.intentId: indicate fast movement, urgency, or sprint-speed activity; represent a high-speed running or racing context

fa-person-seat.appearanceId: a human stick-figure silhouette in a seated upright position on a flat horizontal surface or chair base with legs extended forward; person figure in an upright seated pose
fa-person-seat.functionalityId: represents a seated person or an occupied seat; indicates seating availability, seat selection, or passenger placement

fa-person-seat-reclined.appearanceId: a human stick-figure silhouette in a reclined or backward-leaning seated pose with the upper body tilted back; person figure in a reclining seat position
fa-person-seat-reclined.functionalityId: represents a reclined seat, a reclining passenger, or a lie-flat position; indicates seat recline functionality in a transport or furniture context
fa-person-seat-reclined.intentId: indicate a reclining seat option or reclined passenger position; represent seat recline controls in an aircraft, vehicle, or furniture interface

fa-person-shelter.appearanceId: a human stick-figure silhouette crouched or standing beneath a small triangular roof or shelter canopy outline; person figure under a peaked protective shelter shape
fa-person-shelter.functionalityId: represents a person seeking or taking shelter; indicates emergency shelter, disaster relief, or a protected safe zone
fa-person-shelter.intentId: indicate emergency shelter availability or a person seeking protection; represent disaster relief, safe zones, or humanitarian shelter resources

fa-person-sign.appearanceId: a human stick-figure silhouette holding or standing beside a rectangular sign or placard with both hands raised; person figure holding a sign or banner at chest or head level
fa-person-sign.functionalityId: represents a person holding a protest sign, informational placard, or announcement board; indicates advocacy, demonstration, or wayfinding signage
fa-person-sign.intentId: represent a protester, demonstrator, or sign holder in a civic or wayfinding context; indicate advocacy, announcement, or informational signage carried by a person

fa-person-simple.appearanceId: a single simplified human stick-figure silhouette with a circular head and straight-line body in a neutral standing pose; minimal single person outline with no decorative detail
fa-person-simple.functionalityId: represents a generic individual person or user in a simplified style; indicates a single user, person count, or general human presence
fa-person-simple.intentId: represent a single generic person or user in an interface; indicate individual presence or a single user in a count or profile context

fa-person-through-window.appearanceId: a human stick-figure silhouette in a diving or falling pose passing through or emerging from a rectangular window frame outline; person figure mid-passage through a window opening
fa-person-through-window.functionalityId: represents a person jumping through or falling out of a window; indicates an emergency exit, break-in, escape, or hazardous window scenario
fa-person-through-window.intentId: indicate an emergency window escape or break-in scenario; represent a hazardous fall-through-window situation or emergency egress

fa-person-to-door.appearanceId: a human stick-figure silhouette walking or standing in front of a tall rectangular door outline with a door knob detail; person figure approaching or at a door opening
fa-person-to-door.functionalityId: represents a person approaching, entering, or exiting through a door; indicates access control, entry, check-in, or departure through a doorway
